Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xE02F "SMASHTV-CD00-E02F" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $cd00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Smash TV.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $CD00 which copies 512 bytes of data from $CD20 down to $0200 so that the dump can start at $0400. It then jumps to the entry point at $E02F (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the boot code).
